action.reasoning: Observation: exprate improved to 0.0717 (val peak 0.0872) after 40 epochs; debug shows correct simple cases (e.g. '2 6', partial sqrt) but persistent symbol errors/incompleteness on fractions/scripts (e.g. wrong subscripts, \mbox, early stops). Loss ~1.12, curve steadily decreasing but plateauing. Analysis: Core ResNet+attention captures basic structure; root issues are (1) likely teacher-forcing length/shift bug in Decoder.forward (uses full targets vs. shifted for loss), (2) greedy decode limits seq quality, (3) seq_len and res may lose fine symbols. Incremental edits caused prior truncations but last run succeeded. Decision: Supply COMPLETE fixed model.py (full MathExprRecognizer+corrected teacher-forcing with targets[:,:-1], complete EOS-aware generate, no truncation), COMPLETE train.py (aligned loss with shift, grad_clip=1.0, jsonl metrics logging per epoch+batch, target_h=192, bs=20, 35 epochs, stronger aug/AdamW/scheduler on val_exprate, best.pt on new best); minor predict/debug updates for robustness/map_location. Run train+debug then submit_eval on best.pt for next gain (expect ~0.10+).
